meaning: adv.到哪里,什么目的 cinj. 无论到哪里n.去处,目的地
examples: They knew not whither they went.
They did not know whither they should go.
Microsoft SharePoint, a giant in the client-server paradigm, will whither in this new, mobile world.
Government sources say the posts on the commission are not being allowed to whither away.
